name: dcl-editor
description: Decentraland scene editor — monorepo (in-world web + Electron desktop). The engine (bevy-explorer) is an external dependency consumed as a wasm build.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @dcl-editor/scene && npm run build -w @dcl-editor/ui && npm run build:main -w @dcl-editor/desktop
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run app -w @dcl-editor/desktop
scripts.validate:e2e: npm run build && npm run validate -w @dcl-editor/desktop
